About KTC

Who We Are

Founded over 30 years ago, Kiungani Trading Co. Ltd (KTC) has grown to become one of Dar es Salaam's most trusted super dealers in industrial and construction materials. Based in the Gerezani area, we serve contractors, engineers, manufacturers, and individuals across Tanzania.

We stock a wide range of high-quality products — from structural steel and stainless steel to power tools, generators, water pumps, and all hardware essentials — at competitive prices with unmatched reliability.

📍Kiungani & Skukuu House No. 9, Gerezani Area, Kkoo, Dar es Salaam
⏰Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM
✅Licensed dealer, genuine products, competitive pricing
🚚Serving clients across Dar es Salaam and all Tanzania regions
Our Products & Services

What We Supply

We stock an extensive range of quality industrial, construction and hardware products. Browse our core categories below.

Structural

Steel Materials

I-beams, H-beams, angle iron, square & rectangular hollow sections, channels, and more — structural steel for any project scale.

Enquire Now →
Hardware

Tubes, Pipes & Sections

Round, square, and rectangular tubes; GI pipes; hollow sections in various gauges and lengths for construction and fabrication.

Enquire Now →
Stainless Steel

Steel & Stainless Sheets

Flat steel plates, stainless steel sheets, checker plates, and galvanized sheets in multiple thicknesses and standard sizes.

Enquire Now →
Construction

HTD Steel Bars & Rebars

High-tensile deformed (HTD) steel bars and mild steel rounds for concrete reinforcement, available in all standard diameters.

Enquire Now →
Tools

Power Tools & Equipment

Drills, grinders, circular saws, cut-off machines, welding equipment, nail guns, and a full range of professional-grade power tools.

Enquire Now →
Pumps

Water Pumps

Submersible, centrifugal, and surface water pumps — reliable solutions for agricultural irrigation, domestic water supply, and industrial water management of all scales.

Enquire Now →
Structural

Angle Iron & Steel Sections

Equal and unequal angles, C-channels, T-bars, square hollow sections and flat bars — ideal for frames, gates, and structural fabrication.

Enquire Now →
Power

Generators & Power Units

Petrol and diesel generators for backup power, construction sites, and industrial operations — available in a wide range of capacities to suit any scale of work.

Enquire Now →
Fencing

Fencing & Wire Mesh

Chain link fencing, welded wire mesh panels, field fencing rolls, and binding wire in various gauges — for security, agriculture, and construction.

Enquire Now →
Hardware

Flat Bars & Binding Wire

Mild steel flat bars in all widths and thicknesses, plus galvanized binding wire coils for construction tying, fabrication, and general use.

Enquire Now →
The KTC Advantage

Why Choose Us

Over 30 years of delivering quality products and outstanding service to builders, contractors, and businesses across Tanzania.

🏆

30+ Years of Trust

Since 1994, KTC has been the go-to industrial supplier in Dar es Salaam. Decades of proven reliability you can count on.

📦

Wide Product Range

From structural steel to water pumps and power tools — we carry 500+ products across 6 major categories in one convenient location.

💰

Competitive Pricing

As a super dealer, we offer factory-competitive prices with no compromise on quality. Bulk orders welcome with special rates.

⚡

Fast Response

Need a quote quickly? Our team responds within minutes via WhatsApp or phone. Available Monday–Saturday 9 AM to 5:30 PM.

✅

Quality Guaranteed

We source only certified, genuine products. Every item meets industry quality standards for your peace of mind.

📍

Prime Location

Conveniently located in Gerezani, Dar es Salaam's industrial hub — easily accessible for pickup or on-site delivery coordination.
